tasks.subject: [upgrade-electron-vite] [P1] Bump electron-vite, electron, and @tailwindcss/vite versions
tasks.description:
Edit `apps/desktop/package.json` to bump three devDependencies. All other dependencies must remain unchanged.

Changes to make in `devDependencies`:
- `"electron-vite"`: `"^3.1.0"` â†’ `"^5.0.0"`
- `"electron"`: `"^33.4.11"` â†’ `"^39.8.5"`
- `"@tailwindcss/vite"`: `"^4.1.18"` â†’ `"^4.2.2"`

Leave these unchanged:
- `"@electron/rebuild"`: `"^3.7.2"` (v4 has breaking API changes)
- `"@vitejs/plugin-react"`: `"5.1.4"` (v6 requires Vite 8; electron-vite v5 bundles Vite 7)
- `"electron-builder"`: `"^26.8.1"`
- `"electron-log"`: `"^5.4.3"`
- `"electron-updater"`: `"^6.8.3"`
- `"tailwindcss"`: `"^4.2.2"` (already at target)
- `"typescript"`: `"^5.9.3"`

Do not modify `dependencies`, `scripts`, `main`, `name`, or `version` fields.

tasks.subject: [upgrade-electron-vite] [P1] Remove externalizeDepsPlugin from electron.vite.config.ts
[upgrade-electron-vite] [P1] Regenerate pnpm lockfile after version bumps
tasks.description:
Run `pnpm install` from the repo root to regenerate `pnpm-lock.yaml` with the updated electron-vite, electron, and @tailwindcss/vite versions.

Command:
```bash
pnpm install
```

Run from: repo root (`/path/to/dork-os/core/`), not from `apps/desktop/`.

Expected outcome: `pnpm-lock.yaml` is updated; no install errors.

**Native module note:** Bumping Electron from 33 to 39 changes the ABI (Application Binary Interface). The `better-sqlite3` native binary compiled for Electron 33 will not load in Electron 39. `electron-builder` handles the production rebuild automatically via `npmRebuild: true` in `electron-builder.yml`. For dev mode, the rebuild happens via `@electron/rebuild` on first launch â€” but only if a `NODE_MODULE_VERSION` mismatch error appears in the Electron dev console. If it does, run:
```bash
cd apps/desktop && npx @electron/rebuild --version 39.8.5
```
Do not pre-emptively run this â€” wait to see if the error surfaces in task 1.4 verification.

tasks.subject: [upgrade-electron-vite] [P1] Verify the upgrade â€” build, typecheck, lint, dev, and pack
tasks.description:
Run all verification steps in order. Every check must pass before the upgrade is considered complete.

**Step 1 â€” Build:**
```bash
pnpm --filter @dorkos/desktop build
```
Pass condition: exits 0; `apps/desktop/dist/` is populated with `main/`, `preload/`, and `renderer/` subdirectories.

**Step 2 â€” TypeScript:**
```bash
pnpm typecheck
```
Pass condition: zero errors across all packages in the monorepo.

**Step 3 â€” Lint:**
```bash
pnpm lint
```
Pass condition: zero errors. (The removal of `externalizeDepsPlugin` from the import in task 1.2 eliminates any `no-unused-vars` or unused-import warnings that might have appeared.)

**Step 4 â€” Dev mode:**
```bash
pnpm --filter @dorkos/desktop dev
```
Pass condition: Electron window opens, React app loads in the renderer, HMR is functional (edit a source file in `apps/client/src/` and confirm the renderer hot-reloads without a full restart).

**Step 5 â€” Native module check (during dev mode):**
Open the Electron dev console (View â†’ Toggle Developer Tools in the Electron menu, or Cmd+Option+I). Confirm there is no `NODE_MODULE_VERSION` mismatch error. If one appears, quit dev mode, run the following, then restart dev:
```bash
cd apps/desktop && npx @electron/rebuild --version 39.8.5
```

**Step 6 â€” Pack:**
```bash
pnpm --filter @dorkos/desktop pack
```
Pass condition: unsigned `.app` bundle produced at `apps/desktop/release/mac-arm64/DorkOS.app` (or equivalent path under `release/`). No code signing required â€” `CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false` is already set in the `pack` script.

All six steps must pass. If any step fails, investigate and fix before marking complete.
tasks.activeForm: Verifying build, typecheck, lint, dev mode, and pack
